11208:252969.name: Update available indicator will have breathe effect, glow twice for 2 sec to remind the user to update later on in setting page. It will glow every time user open the app. Glow will stop once the user click on it.
11208:252969.text_content:
Update available indicator will have breathe effect, glow twice for 2 sec to remind the user to update later on in setting page.
It will glow every time user open the app.
Glow will stop once the user click on it.

11208:252985.name: A silent update is in progress Within the DDPM GUI Window show a message "Application unavailable. Firmware Update in Progress. Please try again later" message. Ensure GUI is otherwise disabled and that any buttons or GUI interfaces shown in DDPM's GUI are not accessible. Do not bring DDPM's window to the front or otherwise change the arrangement of DDPM's window.
11208:252985.text_content:
A silent update is in progress
Within the DDPM GUI Window show a message "Application unavailable. Firmware Update in Progress. Please try again later" message.
Ensure GUI is otherwise disabled and that any buttons or GUI interfaces shown in DDPM's GUI are not accessible.
Do not bring DDPM's window to the front or otherwise change the arrangement of DDPM's window.

11208:254012.name: If user remove earbuds from the case during download If user close the case lid
11208:254012.text_content:
If user remove earbuds from the case during download
If user close the case lid

11208:254034.name: EARBUDS If user remove earbuds from the case during download If earbuds battery level is below 30% If user closes the case lid > lose connection Note: User connects the earbuds again to update the FW, user need to go through the FW update process again. And the FW downloading will resume and start from the pervious paused point. eg. if it was stopped at 50%, the updates will restart from 50%.
11208:254034.text_content:
EARBUDS
If user remove earbuds from the case during download
If earbuds battery level is below 30%
If user closes the case lid > lose connection
Note: User connects the earbuds again to update the FW, user need to go through the FW update process again. And the FW downloading will resume and start from the pervious paused point. eg. if it was stopped at 50%,  the updates will restart from 50%.

11208:254043.name: some reasons other than user close the lid and remove earbud from the case
11208:254043.text_content: some reasons other than user close the lid and remove earbud from the case

11208:254089.name: Downloading bar: from 0% to 100%, then show processing bar. Processing bar: always show 50% since we can’t specify the percentage. Animation is a gradient that moves from left to right and on repeat till the process ends.
11208:254089.text_content:
Downloading bar: from 0% to 100%, then show processing bar.
Processing bar: always show 50% since we can’t specify the percentage. Animation is a gradient that moves from left to right and on repeat till the process ends.

11208:259422.name: NOTES Show all hotkeys including factory default ‘none’ Escape = Will cancel the input i.e., if user types SHIFT+F3 --> user presses EXC --> the box input will go back to previous condition before user started editing. ENTER --> Changes applied. Backspace = Deletes as standard function Expand all by default Sort by Menu Bar Tabs Hotkeys: show all hotkey settings (None and customized) Customizable Keys: show only customized settings Order: Follow homepage device category Within each device category, follow homepage order
11208:259422.text_content:
NOTES

Show all hotkeys including factory default ‘none’
Escape = Will cancel the input i.e., if user types SHIFT+F3 --> user presses EXC --> the box input will go back to previous condition before user started editing.
ENTER --> Changes applied.
Backspace = Deletes as standard function
Expand all by default
Sort by Menu Bar Tabs
Hotkeys: show all hotkey settings (None and customized)
Customizable Keys: show only customized settings

Order:
Follow homepage device category
Within each device category, follow homepage order

11208:259443.name: Customize sheet always expanded remove the back button from the setting sheet, we don’t allow the user to go back to the previous customizable key settings Hover over state is applicable No restore to default button shown We don’t show other key customization than the target key.
11208:259443.text_content:
Customize sheet always expanded
remove the back button from the setting sheet, we don’t allow the user to go back to the previous customizable key settings
Hover over state is applicable
No restore to default button shown
We don’t show other key customization than the target key.
